conditions.critical_condition_basis: Critical adsorption point for PO unit
conditions.evidence_text: In the latter column, an even better separation of PEG, PPG diols and allylic PPG is achieved in THF-water (with a critical point for the PO unit at 80 wt.-% THF).
conditions.notes: PPG diols elute at the dead volume (with the solvent peak) under these conditions.
conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemistry, Karl-Franzens-University, Heinrichstrasse 28, A-8010 Graz, Austria; Christian Doppler Laboratory for Microwave Chemistry (CDLMC), Karl-Franzens-University, Heinrichstrasse 28, A-8010 Graz, Austria

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Critical adsorption point for PO unit
conditions.evidence_text: In the latter column, an even better separation of PEG, PPG diols and allylic PPG is achieved in THF-water (with a critical point for the PO unit at 80 wt.-% THF).
conditions.notes: Allylic PPG elutes at the CAP (at 2.84 ml) under these conditions.
conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemistry, Karl-Franzens-University, Heinrichstrasse 28, A-8010 Graz, Austria; Christian Doppler Laboratory for Microwave Chemistry (CDLMC), Karl-Franzens-University, Heinrichstrasse 28, A-8010 Graz, Austria

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Critical adsorption point for PO unit
conditions.evidence_text: critical conditions for the PO unit exist in two different systems, which allow a separation of PEG in SEC mode: Discovery HS PEG in 44% acetone
conditions.notes: Used to separate PPG diols and allylic PPG at the CAP for PO.
